summary: FFI Futures Vision rebuilt as a React/Vite SPA, verified locally, published to GitHub repo and GitHub Pages URL.
next_action: Optional: refine copy/content once the original draft is recovered.
risks: Corrupted source was not available in the project folder, so some labels/copy are assumption-driven rather than source-recovered.
Calculator logic is reconstructed from apparent intent rather than original formulas.
Final GitHub deployment destination still needs the orchestrator/user path before publish.
assumptions: A static React SPA is an appropriate delivery format.
Relative-asset Vite output (`base: './'`) is acceptable for GitHub-hosted static publishing.
The implemented four-phase structure is a conservative reconstruction of the intended funding journey.
